description: Replaced Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Changed groupId from com.oracle.database.jdbc to org.postgresql and artifactId from ojdbc8 to postgresql.

Migrated JPA entity annotations from Oracle to PostgreSQL. Removed Oracle-specific column definitions (NUMBER, SYSTIMESTAMP) and replaced with PostgreSQL equivalents (BIGINT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP). All functional behavior preserved.

Converted all native SQL queries from Oracle syntax to PostgreSQL syntax. Key changes: ROWNUM to LIMIT/OFFSET, TO_CHAR to EXTRACT, NVL to COALESCE, RANK() to ROW_NUMBER(), all uppercase identifiers to lowercase. All queries maintain functional equivalence.
Updated comments and log messages to reference PostgreSQL instead of Oracle. No behavioral changes - all code logic remains identical.
Updated comments and log messages to reference PostgreSQL instead of Oracle. No behavioral changes - all code logic remains identical.

Migrated database configuration from Oracle to PostgreSQL. Changed JDBC URL from jdbc:oracle:thin to jdbc:postgresql, driver class from oracle.jdbc.OracleDriver to org.postgresql.Driver, and dialect from OracleDialect to PostgreSQLDialect.
Migrated Docker database configuration from Oracle to PostgreSQL. Changed JDBC URL to reference postgres-db service, updated driver and dialect accordingly.
